About.title: about-me
About.body: I'm a self-taught front-end developer. I build accessible, responsive websites from scratch and turn them into modern, user-friendly experiences. I love combining creativity and knowledge into every project, and I'm always eager to learn the newest technologies and frameworks.

Contacts.title: contacts
Contacts.intro: I'm interested in freelance opportunities. However, if you have another request or question, don't hesitate to contact me.
